dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3327 IS: D.C. Shield Law Repeal Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mr. Lee introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Homeland Security and Governmental Affairs

form.official-title: To repeal the Human Rights Sanctuary Amendment Act of 2022.

subsection.text: This Act may be cited as the D.C. Shield Law Repeal Act.

section.header: Repeal of Human Rights Sanctuary Amendment Act of 2022
section.text: The Human Rights Sanctuary Amendment Act of 2022 (D.C. Law 24–257) is hereby repealed, and any provision of law amended or repealed by such Act is restored or revived as if such Act had not been enacted into law.
